logSeedLine: Refactor placeholder into benchmark-family adapter implementation tasks.

tasks.title: Implement SWE-bench Verified cloud scoring adapter
tasks.objective: Replace the SWE-bench Verified stub with a real sb-cli based score-producing path that submits prediction files and parses resolved_percent.
tasks.responsibility: Own scripts/adapters/swe_bench.py, the shared SWE-bench cloud adapter, and failure evidence when predictions/API key are missing.
tasks.completionCriteria: swe_bench_verified adapter is configured true, writes completed score JSON when predictions/API key are supplied, and writes blocked/failed evidence otherwise without fabricating scores.
tasks.runReadinessReason: The sb-cli path is known and can be implemented locally.

tasks.title: Implement Terminal-Bench, SkillsBench, and NL2Repo adapters
tasks.objective: Implement the remaining runnable_after_setup adapters that can produce real scores after public harness setup.
tasks.responsibility: Own adapter setup for Terminal-Bench 2.0, SkillsBench, and NL2Repo with official scoring paths.
tasks.completionCriteria: Each adapter can run selected tasks through its public harness and write normalized completed score JSON, or record explicit failed/blocked evidence.
tasks.runReadinessReason: Each benchmark has a different harness and should split into its own implementation task.

tasks.title: Implement ALE-FreeEasy, HCAST, and RE-Bench adapters
tasks.objective: Implement the long-work benchmark adapters after environment setup, task selection, and scoring paths are pinned.
tasks.responsibility: Own ALE-FreeEasy, HCAST public, and RE-Bench adapter setup, including operational blockers and compute/runtime limits.
tasks.completionCriteria: Each long-work adapter either produces real score JSON for a pinned selected subset or records exact operational blockers.
tasks.runReadinessReason: Blocked by operational setup: ALE task environments, HCAST public runnable graders, and RE-Bench compute/runtime constraints must be pinned.

tasks.title: Implement extension benchmark adapters
tasks.objective: Implement full ALE, TheAgentCompany, Vending-Bench, and SWE-bench Multilingual only after public reproducibility and operational requirements are pinned.
tasks.responsibility: Prevent extension benchmarks from appearing score-producing until real public harness paths exist.
tasks.completionCriteria: Extension benchmarks are either implemented with real scoring or explicitly kept blocked/reported_only in harness audit and adapter config.
tasks.runReadinessReason: Blocked until reproducible harness paths and/or heavy self-hosted environments are pinned.
